arts.ttl: Luton boss thanks Town fans for staying with him and his players during Tigers victory
arts.sum: Hatters chief receives excellent ovation at Kenilworth Road

arts.ttl: talkSPORT pundit thinks one Leeds United starter is the weak link
arts.sum: TalkSPORT pundit and former Premier League striker Darren Bent believes the current weak point in the Leeds lineup is Joel Piroe starting up front. Leeds United forward Joel Piroe is the current top scorer for the club with six, but is dividing opinion about his starting berth under Daniel Farke due to his all-round displays.

arts.ttl: Leeds United faithful will love Rob Edwards' comments ahead of Elland Road showdown
arts.sum: Rob Edwards is relishing the challenge of facing Leeds United tomorrow night, labelling the Whites as the "best team" in the Championship. Edwards takes his Luton Town side to Elland Road looking to build on Saturday's morale-boosting win over struggling Hull City.

arts.ttl: Javi Gracia lined up for unusual first job after Leeds United – Been out of work since Whites exit
arts.sum: Javi Gracia joined Leeds United in February 2023 and was out of Elland Road by May of that year. Some, including the manager himself, thought the decision was harsh and that he had the chance to achieve the club’s goals. arts.ttl: Immense recent footage of Leeds United star should prove any doubters wrong
arts.sum: Leeds United’s defending during their win over Swansea City was far from perfect, with Pascal Struijk at fault of one of the goals, but his work in possession totally outweighed it. For Leeds, the defending for the opener was questionable as Harry Darling broke free, but the second goal from Liam Cullen brought criticism for Struijk.

arts.ttl: Luton Town get major boost for Leeds United trip with quintet in line to face Championship leaders
arts.sum: “What we’ll do is we’ll try and pick what we think is the best team for this game, and then we’ll do exactly the same for Norwich in a couple of days time after that," said Edwards. Jamaican international Bell has recovered from a minor Achilles problem that kept him out of Saturday's win over Hull City and Clark is pushing for a recall after serving a one-match suspension.

arts.sum: A big January could be needed at Ibrox despite their limited spending power

arts.ttl: Good news for Luton as Town quartet are declared fit to face Leeds United
arts.sum: Bell available to play against Championship table-toppers

arts.ttl: Leicester City could be about to hit Leeds United’s promotion rivals with hammer blow
arts.sum: Leicester could be about to poach Carlos Corberan from Leeds’ rivals West Brom While Leeds were pipped to promotion by Leicester City, Ipswich Town and Southampton last season, life in the Premier League for the trio isn’t exactly going as planned.

arts.ttl: Stoke City, Plymouth Argyle among multiple clubs keen on Leeds United fringe man
